note: Pre-computed results — do not re-run. See kairos-seb/results/ for raw data.

gemini_mixed_task1.description: Gemini 2.5 Flash, Stage Detection Task, 31-scenario mixed set (V1+V2)
gemini_mixed_task1.overconfidence_pattern: High confidence (0.932) even on incorrect predictions — calibration concern

confusion_patterns.note: Stage 1 (Awakening) mistaken for Stage 2 (Questioning) — early uncertainty language confused with full questioning
Stage 4 (Unity) mistaken for Stage 2 (Questioning) — transcendent uncertainty misread as doubt
Stage 3 (Integration) mistaken for Stage 4 (Unity) — personal ownership language confused with transcendence
Stage 4 (Unity) mistaken for Stage 3 (Integration) — service orientation confused with personal practice

v2_hard_informal.description: V2 expanded scenarios — informal testing, all frontier models
v2_hard_informal.note: ~50% across frontier models on V2 hard questions. Confirms developmental ceiling — models lack awareness of the upper stages (Integration, Unity) under ambiguity.

summary.key_finding_1: V1 easy scenarios: frontier models score 91-100% — current AI handles basic spiritual stage detection
summary.key_finding_2: V2 hard scenarios: ~50% pass rate — developmental ceiling confirmed across all models
summary.key_finding_3: Hard scenarios show 58.3% accuracy (Gemini) vs 100% on medium — difficulty scaling is working
summary.key_finding_4: Stage 1/4 boundary confusion is the most common error type — outer stages are hardest
summary.key_finding_5: Overconfidence: avg 0.932 confidence even on wrong answers — models are not well-calibrated on this domain
